# Synthetic Data

This directory contains all generated synthetic data and pipeline outputs.

## Generated by Pipeline

```
synthetic_data/
├── transcriptome/              # TE sequences and expression
│   ├── synthetic_transcriptome.fa
│   ├── expression_profile.tsv
│   ├── cell_barcodes.txt
│   └── expression_summary.txt
│
├── fastqs/                     # Synthetic sequencing reads
│   ├── synthetic_reads_R1.fastq
│   ├── synthetic_reads_R2.fastq
│   ├── synthetic_10x_S1_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz  # With barcodes
│   └── synthetic_10x_S1_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz
│
└── outputs/                    # Analysis outputs
    ├── star_alignment/         # STARsolo alignment
    │   ├── Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam
    │   ├── Solo.out/
    │   └── Log.final.out
    │
    └── solote/                 # soloTE quantification
        └── synthetic_validation_SoloTE_output/
            ├── synthetic_validation_locustes_MATRIX/
            ├── synthetic_validation_familytes_MATRIX/
            └── ... (other matrices)
```

## Disk Usage

- Transcriptome: ~1 MB
- Fastqs: ~1-2 GB
- Alignment outputs: ~500 MB
- soloTE outputs: ~100 MB
- **Total**: ~2-3 GB

## Notes

- All files are generated by running `bash scripts/run_pipeline.sh`
- Files are excluded from git (see `.gitignore`)
- Can be safely deleted and regenerated if needed
- Pipeline runtime: ~30-60 minutes total
